name: Sour Cream Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream sugar and margarine together at medium speed of an electric mixer until combined.
2. Gradually add egg substitute, beating well after each addition.
3. Combine sour cream and baking soda in a separate bowl; stir well.
4. Set aside the sour cream mixture.
5. In a separate bowl, sift together cake flour and salt.
6. Alternately add the sifter mixtures to the creamed mixture, beginning and ending with the flour mixture. Beat on low speed until just combined.
7. Stir in vanilla extract.
8. Pour batter into a 10-inch tube pan coated with oil spray.
9. Bake at 325°F for 1 hour and 35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Allow cooling in the pan for 10 minutes before removing from the pan.
11. Cool completely on a wire rack.
12. Serve one-inch slices.
Serving Size: One slice (approximately 1 inch)
Fat per Serving: Approximately 7.7 grams
